title: Making up after a fight
desc: Repair things with someone you love
setting: You and Lucía argued earlier and said things you regret. You've cooled down and come to make peace.

options.es: Lo necesitaba, pero ahora quiero hablar.
options.en: I did, but now I want to talk.
options.feedback: Honest and constructive — acknowledging the space while choosing to reconnect. Mature.
Clear, warm intent. Leading with repair sets the right tone immediately.
Coming in still hostile won't repair anything. Cool down fully before you talk.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: Yo también dije cosas que no sentía.
steps.en: I said things I didn't mean too.

options.es: Perdoná lo que dije. Estaba molesto, no pensé.
options.en: Forgive what I said. I was upset, I didn't think.
options.feedback: Owning your part without excuses is the heart of a real apology. Strong.
Assigning blame reopens the fight. Repair means owning your side, not scoring points.

options.es: Los dos nos pasamos un poco.
options.en: We both went a little too far.
options.feedback: Fair, though owning your own part specifically lands warmer than splitting it evenly.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.es: No me gusta pelear con vos.
steps.en: I don't like fighting with you.

options.es: A mí tampoco. Quiero que entendás cómo me sentí.
options.en: Me neither. I want you to understand how I felt.
options.feedback: Agreeing AND gently asking to be understood — that's how you grow from a fight.
Simple and warm. A shared commitment to do better.

options.es: Pues entonces no hagás esas cosas.
options.feedback: Turning it into a demand reignites it. Speak from your feelings, not ultimatums.

steps.speaker: Lucía
steps.en: Come here. I love you, silly.

options.es: Yo también te quiero. Perdón otra vez.
options.en: I love you too. Sorry again.
options.feedback: Warm, affectionate, and humble — the perfect way to close the loop and reconnect.
Tender and real — admitting you missed her even after a few hours is sweet.

options.es: Está bien, pero la próxima portate mejor.
options.en: Fine, but behave better next time.
options.feedback: A jab in the middle of making up undoes it. Just receive the affection.
